examples: I got a real bargain at the sale.
We bargained with the seller for a lower price.
context: Already it is so lit up and there's so much to see. They have free concerts, of course lots of bars and tons of different kinds of entertainment. So let's walk around and see what Freemont Street has to offer. I was ready to go to a bar but our first stop is a gift shop. My mom is a bargain queen.

examples: I'm definitely coming to the party.
This is definitely the best pizza I've ever had.
You should definitely try the cheesecake.
context: I think we all ate our money's worth. I am stuffed to the max. Vegas buffets are definitely extravagant. The selection was incredible. The food was top notch. We all were very satisfied with our meals. Now it's nap time. I guess we're walking off all of our food from the buffet because we just checked Uber and it's $40 for a 10 minute drive. That's crazy.

There are tons of free shows that you can enjoy in Vegas. Most bars and hotels on the strip offer free shows in entertainment. We came to Harris for a bowling piano bar. It's so much fun. The guy is playing a lot of classic songs and I'm so impressed. The most well-known free show on the Vegas strip is definitely the Belagio fountain show. People gather here every night to watch the fountain show and they have it every 15 minutes or so. You can't miss out on this one.

examples: We went to a fancy restaurant for our anniversary.
That's a fancy car you've got there.
She was wearing a fancy dress to the party.
context: I'm going straight for the fancy food. The lobster and caviar bar.
Right in the middle here. This is a bad crab leg. You can tell I don't eat fancy foods a lot.
